title: hieracium dermophyllum subsp. nufenense
intro: Hieracium dermophyllum subsp. nufenense, also known as Nufenen Hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family, Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and has been used to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Hieracium dermophyllum subsp. nufenense include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used externally or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
